description: R2d L3 coverage vectors. THREE families: (a) COVERAGE vectors — the full projected AnalysisCoverage from REAL resolveModel over inline workspaces (indexWorkspace pre-resolve → resolveModel post-resolve/pre-summary → projectL3Coverage; READ-only, NEVER re-runs buildCoverage). Covers routine count; bodyAvailable; the 4 unresolved resolutions (unknown/ambiguous/member-not-found/external-target) AND the negatives (builtin/resolved NOT counted); dynamic dispatch; opaqueApps empty. (b) WARNING-UNPARSED-UNIT — an empty .al file produces an index-stage WARNING → sourceUnitsParsed = total - 1; al-sem's EXACT diagnostic (severity/stage/sourceRef) is captured so Rust reproduces the decrement (buildCoverage keys ONLY on the triple, NOT the message). (c) MULTISET-DUPLICATE (SYNTHETIC) — a hand-built callGraph fed to the REAL buildCoverage proves the sorted multiset PRESERVES duplicates (cs0 twice, op9 twice) and the 4-resolutions filter excludes maybe/opaque/builtin/resolved. Hand-authored invariants were asserted against the live projection before emit.

coverageVectors.name: two_routines_all_body_available
coverageVectors.description: two source-defined routines → routinesTotal=2, routinesBodyAvailable=2, parseIncomplete empty

coverageVectors.name: parse_incomplete_routine_independent_of_body
coverageVectors.description: one clean routine + one with a syntax-error body → routinesParseIncomplete has ONE StableRoutineId; crucially routinesBodyAvailable === 2 (the broken routine still has a body) — parseIncomplete and bodyAvailable are INDEPENDENT filters, NOT a partition (Rev2 #4). The parse-incomplete routine's StableRoutineId is the same form as any routine id.
invariants: the parse-incomplete id is a StableRoutineId (appGuid:Type:num#hash)

coverageVectors.name: unresolved_unknown_dynamic_codeunit_run
coverageVectors.description: a dynamic Codeunit.Run(<var>) → dispatchKind 'dynamic' + resolution 'unknown' → one unresolved callsite AND one dynamic site

coverageVectors.name: unresolved_ambiguous_overload
coverageVectors.description: two same-arity overloads of Do(x) called via an untyped arg → resolution 'ambiguous' → unresolved callsite
invariants: at least one unresolved callsite present (ambiguous counts)

coverageVectors.name: unresolved_member_not_found
coverageVectors.description: a member call to a method that does not exist on the typed receiver → 'member-not-found' → unresolved callsite
invariants: at least one unresolved callsite present (member-not-found counts)

coverageVectors.name: unresolved_external_target
coverageVectors.description: a member call on a var typed `Codeunit "Nonexistent Cu"` (named object NOT in the workspace, no dep claims it) → 'external-target' → unresolved callsite
invariants: at least one unresolved callsite present

coverageVectors.name: builtin_not_unresolved
coverageVectors.description: a recognized no-receiver global builtin (StrLen, in al-builtins.ts) → dispatchKind/resolution 'builtin' → NOT in unresolvedCallsites (the 4-resolutions filter excludes builtin)

coverageVectors.name: opaque_codeunit_run_not_unresolved
coverageVectors.description: a Codeunit.Run(Codeunit::"Out Of World Cu") on a named codeunit NOT in the workspace → dispatchKind 'codeunit-run' + resolution 'opaque' → NOT in unresolvedCallsites (the 4-resolutions filter excludes opaque)
invariants: no dynamic sites (named target is not dynamic)

coverageVectors.name: resolved_direct_not_unresolved
coverageVectors.description: a bare call to an existing same-object procedure → 'resolved' → NOT in unresolvedCallsites

warningUnparsedVector.name: warning_unparsed_unit
warningUnparsedVector.description: two source units; the EMPTY .al file produces an index-stage WARNING (tree-sitter throws on empty input) whose sourceRef === the unit id → sourceUnitsParsed = sourceUnitsTotal - 1 = 1. buildCoverage keys ONLY on (stage:'index', severity:'warning', sourceRef===unit.id); the message text is NOT consulted, so Rust reproduces the decrement by emitting a matching triple.

indexDiagnostics.message: Failed to index src/empty.al: Unable to convert TypeError [ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE]: ArrayBufferView must have a length > 0. A pointer to empty memory doesn't work to a pointer

invariants: the warning's sourceRef matches the empty unit's id

multisetDuplicateVector.name: multiset_duplicate_synthetic
multisetDuplicateVector.description: SYNTHETIC (no real AL source produces a callsite with ≥2 unresolved edges — interface multi-edges are 'maybe'). A hand-built callGraph is fed to the REAL buildCoverage: two unresolved edges share callsiteId cs0 (→ cs0 appears TWICE in unresolvedCallsites), two dynamic edges share operationId op9 (→ op9 appears TWICE in dynamicDispatchSites). The projection is a SORTED MULTISET — duplicates are PRESERVED, NEVER deduped. Also asserts the 4-resolutions filter: maybe/opaque/builtin/resolved edges are EXCLUDED from unresolvedCallsites.
invariants: unresolvedCallsites cardinality === 4 (cs0 twice + cs1 once + cs2 once)
cs0 appears EXACTLY twice in unresolvedCallsites (duplicate preserved)
op9 appears EXACTLY twice in dynamicDispatchSites (duplicate preserved)
dynamicDispatchSites cardinality === 2 (only the two dynamic edges)
maybe/opaque/builtin/resolved edges are NOT in unresolvedCallsites
